books.title: A Memoir of Robert Blincoe, an Orphan Boy / Sent from the workhouse of St. Pancras, London, at seven years of age, to endure the horrors of a cotton-mill, through his infancy and youth, with a minute detail of his sufferings, being the first memoir of the kind published.

Health: Five Lay Sermons to Working-People
Horae subsecivae. Rab and His Friends, and Other Papers
